reviews.originalComment: Harga yg ditawarkan agoda biasanya lebih rendah, pas liat di reception.. Kok lebih murah dari agoda...
reviews.reviewComments: The price offered by Agoda is usually lower, but when I checked at the reception... Why is it cheaper than Agoda...?
It was a good stay. The main point that i wanted to highlight here is the cleanliness of the room is beyond my expectation. Overall its value for money that i have spend.

good hard bed. room and toilet was clean. good hot water shower with moderate water pressure. did not use any soap so can review. the foc toothpaste was leaking in the pastic with toothbrush so didnt use. two hangers provided. bath towel thou was clean was pretty worn out. toto brand toilet which is good. two soft pillows provided. bedsheets had spots of pale yellow stains. there were two middle areas front and back where the blanket was torn. table was clean. good working tv with english channels. ac was good. both remotes were dirty. i booked the accom bcos i wanted the wooden flooring shown in agoda but was given tile flooring. unless management look into the comments, the overall price should be much lowered
Fine for a night or two in Banda Aceh. Small room, comfortable enough, clean-ish, a/c is fine, WiFi is ok. For the price you pay it’s acceptable.
kami pesan kamar yg deluxe triple room. kamar yg di foto tidak sama dengan yg di berikan. staffnya blg gak semua kamar seperti itu.  yg positif hanya shower air panasnya yg on terus.

reviews.originalComment: Fasilitas hotel bagus, cuma sayang bgt sistem parkirnya gak jelas. Pertama tanya resepsionis katanya bayar sekali aja, keluar mau cari makan kata petugas parkir bayar sekali aja besok check out ga usah bayar lagi dan dikasih karcis parkir. Pas besoknya check out eh petugas parkirnya udah ganti dan disuruh bayar lagi, katanya krn udah ganti hari jadi harus bayar lagi. Aneh bgt. Petugas parkirnya cewek kurus, masuk parkir pun pake kartu e-toll, kalo ga bayar lagi ya ga dibuka portal exitnya. Jd total bayar parkir sampek 8ribu. Nggak pernah² nginap d hotel bayar parkir sampek segitu.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel facilities are good, but it's a shame the parking system is unclear. First, I asked the receptionist and they said to pay just once, and when I went out to find something to eat, the parking attendant said to pay just once, and that I didn't need to pay again when checking out the next day, and they gave me a parking ticket. But the next day when checking out, the parking attendant had changed and told me to pay again, saying that since it was a new day, I had to pay again. It's very strange. The parking attendant was a skinny girl, and to enter the parking lot, you had to use an e-toll card, and if you didn't pay again, they wouldn't open the exit gate. So in total, I paid 8,000 for parking. I've never stayed at a hotel where parking costs that much.

reviews.originalComment: Pesan hotel dialihkan ke homestaynya mereka tanpa sepengetahuan, alasan nya itu dari agodanya…buruk sekali pelayanan.. dikasi kamar lantai 3 tidak ada lift..kamar bau apek
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel reservation was redirected to their homestay without knowledge, the reason being that it was from Agoda... the service was very poor.. given a room on the 3rd floor with no lift.. the room smelled musty.
Very comfortable. What makes me comeback is the cleanliness.
Ok
The parking space is a bit narrow.
“Highly recommend – clean, comfortable, friendly staff, and great location!”

The room is clean and the facilities are okay.

Hôtel propre, chambre confortable mais sans fenêtre, douche chaude et satisfaisante, petit déjeuner correct sans plus, café infect, ce qui est surprenant pour la région. Personnel poli et aidant. Pour 500K IRP, je me serais attendu à un peu mieux.
Sehr sauber, gut gelegen, preiswert,  freundlich
Recomended
Mantap
Puas
Very clean and neat room. We spent just one night and it was very satisfying. Confortable bed, good and warm shower, good ac, good wifi. Recommended!
